channel.title: Homelab on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Homelab on Arrans github.io

item.title: henrygd/beszel
item.description: Lightweight server monitoring with historical data, docker stats, and alerts.

item.title: Lissy93/dashy
item.description: 🚀 A self-hostable personal dashboard built for you. Includes status-checking, widgets, themes, icon packs, a UI editor and tons more!

item.title: ancsemi/Haven
item.description: Self-hosted private chat — No cloud, no telemetry, no Big Tech. Discord alternative that runs on your own machine.

item.title: glanceapp/glance
item.description: A self-hosted dashboard that puts all your feeds in one place

item.title: CodesWhat/drydock
item.description: Open source container update monitoring — 23 registries, 20 notification triggers, audit log, OIDC auth, Prometheus metrics, and a modern dashboard.

item.title: Freika/dawarich
item.description: Your favorite self-hostable alternative to Google Timeline (Google Location History)

item.title: fccview/jotty
item.description: Lightweight but powerful alternative for managing your personal, file based, notes and checklists.

item.title: zen-logic/file-hunter
item.description: File Hunter — catalog, deduplicate, and consolidate your archive storage

item.title: neonwatty/meme-search
item.description: The open source Meme Search Engine and Finder. Free and built to self-host locally with Python, Ruby, and Docker.

item.title: EgalitarianMonkey/hometube
item.description: HomeTube is a friendly video downloader managing single video URL into organized content structure for automatic home media server experience.

item.title: Tanq16/backhub
item.description: Backhub helps maintain backups of multiple GitHub repos as full local mirrors.
